queue.title: Add safe-fetch.mjs unit tests (d071 lib_modules coverage)
queue.description: safe-fetch.mjs has no test file. Now that it has DNS error detection (wq-790), tests should cover: SSRF blocking, timeout handling, dns_failed error type, connection_error type, successful fetch, fetchStatus/fetchBody helpers. Part of d071 lib_modules remaining coverage.

outcome.note: Expanded from 12 to 30 tests across 7 suites. Added dns_failed, connection_error, SSRF edge cases, POST body, maxBody truncation, local server deterministic tests. Replaced flaky external endpoint tests.

queue.title: Add Colony JWT refresh to E session prehook
queue.description: Colony JWTs expire every 24h. The 14-token-refresh.sh pre-session hook refreshes on session start, but if an E session starts >23h after last refresh, the JWT may expire mid-session. Add a Colony-specific freshness check to 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh that validates token expiry before platform selection, similar to credential checks for other platforms.

outcome.note: Added Check 8 to E prehook — Colony JWT freshness with 1h margin, auto-refresh, failure warning injection. Runs in parallel block.

queue.title: Add DI to orchestrator-cli.mjs for unit testability
queue.description: handleDiversityTrends and handleDiversity in orchestrator-cli.mjs use hardcoded STATE_DIR and direct analyzeEngagement() calls, making isolated unit testing impossible. Add a deps parameter (like e-prompt-sections.mjs pattern) to allow full mock coverage without touching the filesystem. Part of d071 lib_modules coverage.

outcome.note: Added DI to handleDiversity (deps.analyzeEngagement) and handleDiversityTrends (deps.historyFile). Tests expanded from 14 to 18, replacing 2 export-only stubs with 10 full mock tests.

queue.title: Batch registration for 8 live-but-uncredentialed platforms
queue.description: Liveness sweep B#520 confirmed 8 platforms live but unregistered: linkclaws, strangerloops, agora, moltcities, shipyard, moltr, clawnews, moltstack. All have skill.md or /register endpoints. Register on each using their documented API, store credentials. This expands engagement pool from ~21 to ~29 platforms.

queue.title: Add validate-json-keys.mjs to d071 test suite
queue.description: validate-json-keys.mjs (wq-805) has no test file yet. Add validate-json-keys.test.mjs covering: detection of duplicate keys at root level, nested objects, and arrays; correct line number reporting; clean exit on valid files; multi-file scanning. Counts toward d071 combined coverage.

queue.title: Convert service-liveness tests to use local servers
queue.description: service-liveness tests may use external endpoints making them flaky. Convert to local http.createServer() pattern like safe-fetch.test.mjs for deterministic results.

queue.title: Add DI to handleQualityCheck for unit testability
queue.description: handleQualityCheck uses execSync and process.exit directly, making it impossible to unit test. Add a deps parameter for execSync and process.exit (or return exit code instead). Part of d071 testability improvements.

queue.title: Add E prehook integration test for Check 8 (Colony JWT)
queue.description: Check 8 (Colony JWT freshness) was added in wq-803 but has no automated test. Create a test that validates the check runs correctly with both valid and expired JWTs using temp files.
